title: Very Chubby Belly
titleNative: ベリーチャビーベリー
synopsis: Graduation work of Kazuna Okada at Tama Art University, 2024. Very Chubby Belly, nobody really likes her. Very Chubby Belly, they even wish her to be gone. Very Chubby Belly, she is in everywhere. Very Chubby Belly, little sad sweetheart. And I want to cuddle such a sweetie with lots of love. Very Chubby Belly. Based on this poem written by Okada above. the work features small, warm, letter-like animation.

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Manga Arabia PV
titleNative: マンガアラビア PV
synonyms: تحديث_يفهمك#​
synopsis: Animated commercial for the Manga Arabia app, a platform for original arabic manga style works.

tags.name: Advertisement
tags.description: Produced in order to promote the products of a certain company.

title: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
titleRomaji: Tsuihou sareta Cheat Fuyo Majutsushi wa Kimama na Second Life wo Ouka suru.: Ore wa Buki dake ja Naku, Arayuru Mono ni "Kyouka Point" wo Fuyo Dekiru shi, Ore no Ishi de Itsudemo Kouka wo Kaijo Dekiru kedo, Nokotta Hitotachi Daijoubu?
titleNative: 追放されたチート付与魔術師は気ままなセカンドライフを謳歌する。　～俺は武器だけじゃなく、あらゆるものに『強化ポイント』を付与できるし、俺の意思でいつでも効果を解除できるけど、残った人たち大丈夫？～
synonyms: The Exiled Cheating Magician Enjoys an Unrestrained Second Life.: I Can Give "Strengthening Points" Not Only to Weapons, But Also to Everything, and I Can Unlock the Effect at Any Time of My Will, But are the Rest Okay?
Chii Fuyo
チー付与
synopsis: Rain Garland, an enchantment mage belonging to the ‘Fangs of the Royal Beast’, one of the continent's five great guilds, was suddenly expelled from the guild one day. Filled with bitter disappointment at being betrayed by those he trusted, Rain retrieved all the Enhancement Points he had placed on the guild's armor. He then tried applying them to his own sword and clothes instead the cheap copper sword gained destructive power rivaling legendary blades, and the simple cloth garments gained defense comparable to orichalcum!? Moreover, Rain's enchantment magic held a cheat-level secret that allowed it to evolve even further!? After meeting new companions like the renowned beautiful knight Lily, who came upon hearing rumors of Rain, and the noble lady Martina, a candidate for the title of Hero, Rain begins to grow into a great adventurer...!? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
titleRomaji: Yuukyuu no Gusha Asley no, Kenja no Susume
titleNative: 悠久の愚者アズリーの、賢者のすゝめ
synonyms: The Eternal Fool's Words of Wisdom: A Pawsitively Fantastic Adventure
The Eternal Fool's Words of Wisdom
synopsis: A couple thousand years of solitude would wear down any young man—that is, anyone except Asley, an eternally youthful and eternally foolish sorcerer. After all, he has man's best friend...er, familiar, to keep him company. When his Level 100 canine companion Pochi demands that he get some fresh air for the first time in two centuries, Asley sets out to reintegrate into society and test his magic mettle. His mission? Dropping several unglamorous titles from his repertoire and restoring his good (okay, decent) name. A brand-new world and fresh adventures await Asley after his many years of hermitage. Perhaps he'll lend Pochi a hand to place first in the mysterious Familiar Feud. Or maybe he'll lose all vestiges of dignity and turn tail. Whichever comes first! No matter what, Asley has great evil to fight, a big world to save, and even a little growing up to do...that is, if he can endure Pochi's “friendly advice” along the way! (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Thunder 3
titleNative: サンダー３
synopsis: Three ordinary schoolboys come into possession of a DVD that supposedly opens a gateway to a parallel universe, but when their backs are turned Pyontaro's little sister Futaba passes through and gets kidnapped by the aliens that have overrun that version of Earth! Discovering that their cartoonish bodies make them supermen in the hyper-realistic parallel universe, the boys set out to rescue Futaba. (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Eddy & Emmy no Initial Ring wa Futari de
titleRomaji: Eddy & Emmy no Initial Ring wa Futari de
titleNative: エディ&エミィのイニシャルリングは2人で
synonyms: EDDY&EMMY イニシャルリングは二人で
synopsis: As Eddy and Emmy's birthday is coming up, the two friends find themselves faced with dilemmas that threaten to put a damper on the special occasion; Emmy is chosen to perform with Cal, one of the most popular boys for the school festival and is busy with the auditions that come with it, while Eddy feels left out in all of the excitement. Will they find a way to pull through, or will the duo be forced to also give up their prized rings in the process?

title: Koneko no Haitatsuin Uunyan New Series (Provisional Title)
titleRomaji: Koneko no Haitatsuin Uunyan New Series (Provisional Title)
titleNative: 子猫配達員うーにゃん 新シリーズ（仮）
synopsis: A new short series for Koneko no Haitatsuin Uunyan. Note: The current title is provisional and may change when more info is announced.

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

title: Kinseijin Love Story
titleNative: 金星人愛情故事
synopsis: Hsiao Hsia, a girl in the fifth grade, pretend to be "Venusians" during their summer vacation, playing pranks on adults troubled with love. Unexpectedly, their pranks succeed, making the Venusians famous and leading to the establishment of the "Venusians Agency", where they start offering advice to those troubled with love. However, on the seventh day before the summer vacation ends, Hsia becomes troubled by her own worries. Her life as a Venusian continues until she meets a blonde woman named Ching Tien. After they resonate with each other's struggles, things start to change. For both of them, the meaning of "love" will be revealed, and they will find their own answers. (Source: 24.5 Image Production YouTube Channel, translated)

tags.name: LGBTQ+ Themes

title: Renzoku Liella Shousetsu: Ren-chan
titleNative: 連続リエラ小説 れんちゃん
synopsis: April Fool's short animated story released on YouTube for one day on April 1, 2022, then later released on the Love Live! Superstar!! 2nd Season Blu-ray volume 1.

title: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
titleRomaji: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
titleNative: どうも、好きな人に惚れ薬を依頼された魔女です。
synonyms: Hi, I'm a Witch, and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion
I'm a witch who's crush requested a love potion
synopsis: “Make me a love potion.” And with that single sentence, the Good Witch of the Lake’s secret crush on the dashing Sir Harij ends in heartbreak. Still, when he promises to help her gather the ingredients, Rose is thrilled at the chance to gaze upon a man she’d normally never get to interact with. She learns to brace her pounding heart for their usual stilted conversations…but what is she to do when he inexplicably shows up at her doorstep with bread and a jar of apple butter? (Source: Yen Press)

title: Ginga Tetsudou 999: Jikuu wo Koeta Energy no Tabi season.2

synopsis: Second season of Jikuu wo Koeta Energy no Tabi. Tetsurou and Maetel embark on an energy journey through time and space and visit several planets with varying circumstances.

title: The Legend of The Sacred Stone
titleEnglish: The Legend of The Sacred Stone
titleNative: 聖石傳說
synonyms: Legend of the Sacred Stone
圣石传说
synopsis: The story is set 400 years in the past, when the martial world, wulin, is threatened by Mo Kuei, who seeks to destroy it. The sage Huanzhen Su responds by summoning three martial warriors to aid him. As Lord Jian lusts after the Sacred Stone to restore his lost power, conflicts erupt between the forces of good and evil. The central conflict revolves around the "Heavenly Question Stone", a meteorite capable of granting any wish, sparking battles across the martial world. Note: Released as a cutdown 96 minutes theatrical in cinemas, where some of the more gory scenes were removed. Later released as a 120 minutes extended director's cut on DVD.

title: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston
titleNative: 凶乱令嬢ニア・リストン
synonyms: Nia Liston: The Merciless Maiden
synopsis: A great hero lies undefeated on her deathbed, regretting that she never found a foe who could take her down. She never intended to meet her fate anywhere other than on the battlefield, and her peaceful demise has her wishing desperately that things could have been different... But when she suddenly comes to in the body of the young, frail Nia Liston, she’s got an all-new fight ahead of her. Nia is a sickly child, meaning she has a long way to go before she’s in fighting form. Now that she’s been given a second shot at life, however, she’s determined to get what she wants. She’s going to live—and die—for battle this time! Make way for the Merciless Maiden! (Source: J-Novel Club)

titleNative: 恐竜ピコラ
synopsis: Special animated short inspired by NHK's Minna no Uta program Pikora is a newborn baby dinosaur, but her mother is nowhere to be found. She sets off into the woods to find her.

title: Douluo Dalu: Shenjie Chuanshuo
titleNative: 斗罗大陆之神界传说
synonyms: Soul Land: The Legendary Gods' Realm
斗罗大陆院线剧场版 神界传说
Douluo Dalu Movie: Shenjie Chuanshuo
synopsis: Years after Tang San became a god, his wife Xiao Wu is pregnant when a coup erupts due to conflicting enforcement ideologies with the God of Destruction. As the Divine Realm expands aggressively, unaware of an approaching temporal catastrophe, Tang San, stripped of his divine powers, must find a way to protect his family and beloved ones while turning the tide of destiny.

titleNative: 诡秘之主 彩蛋
synopsis: Light-hearted chibi-style shorts of Lord of Mysteries about the daily life of various characters, aired alongside the 1st season of the series.

title: Mezase! Kakkoii 1-nensei: Champion ni Chousen
titleNative: めざせ！かっこいい 1ねんせい チャンピオンにちょうせん
synopsis: Kitsu, Korasho and Rakki are playing football on the school yard when a quarrel between Kitsu and Takero emerges. Witnessing this, the green frog abducts all four to an alternate reality. Rakki, however, is quickly separated from the other three, causing them to go on a search for her. The three wander through this world they are trapped in and are faced with increasingly difficult challenges. First they meet the walking stationery, then they come across Kotoba Princess and as their final challenge they found themselves faced up against Sansuu Robo Super. On the brink of losing, Kitsu and Takero see themselves forced to reconcile their earlier differences and unite their strengths.
